extensionName.description: Extension name shown in about:addons and the toolbar.

extensionDescription.message: Detect manga/comic images, translate the text via your own LLM API key, and overlay the translation in place.
extensionDescription.description: Extension description shown in about:addons and on AMO.

commandSelectRegionDescription.description: Keyboard shortcut description for the region-select fallback (F10).

commandPeekOriginalDescription.description: Keyboard shortcut description for the peek-original toggle (F14).

errorAuth.description: Overlay badge / toast message for an authentication failure.

errorRateLimit.message: MangaLens: rate limited — try again shortly
errorRateLimit.description: Overlay badge / toast message for a rate-limit failure.

errorRefusal.message: MangaLens: the provider declined this image
errorRefusal.description: Overlay badge message when the provider safety-refuses.

errorNetwork.message: MangaLens: network error — couldn't reach the provider
errorNetwork.description: Overlay badge message for a network failure.

errorMalformed.message: MangaLens: couldn't read the provider's response
errorMalformed.description: Overlay badge message for a malformed provider response.

errorUnknown.description: Overlay badge message for an unclassified failure.

regionSelectHint.message: Drag to select · Esc to cancel
regionSelectHint.description: Hint shown on the drag-select crosshair overlay (F10).

regionNoImage.message: MangaLens: no image under the selection
regionNoImage.description: Toast when a drag-select rectangle intersects no image.

regionCantAccess.description: Toast when a tainted canvas / blob image can't be read (§7.3).

regionTooSmall.description: Toast when the drag-select crop is too small to translate.

toastOpenSettings.description: Action button on the auth error toast; opens the options page.

popupBannerKey.message: No API key for this provider.

optionsPrefetchAheadHint.message: At most this many pages past your reading position are ever auto-sent to the provider — the hard budget for auto-translate. Translate all is not limited by it.
optionsPrefetchAheadHint.description: Options hint under the prefetchAhead field (Phase 9 reading-window budget guarantee).

optionsPagesPerRequestHint.message: Images per provider request. 1 = one page per request (default). 2–3 recommended for Translate all — batches pages to amortize the prompt and cut cost.
optionsPagesPerRequestHint.description: Options hint under the pagesPerRequest field (Phase 8 batching).
